refactor_items.title: Add `s` to `_ltx23` explicit signature
refactor_items.description: Update `_ltx23` signature from `(*, mdir, prompt, image, w, h, n, f, c, seed, audio=None, **_)` to `(*, mdir, prompt, image, w, h, n, f, s, c, seed, audio=None, **_)` to match PRD spec FR-6. Cosmetic only — `s` is still not forwarded to any pipeline since ltx23 pipelines have no `steps` parameter.

refactor_items.title: Add unit tests for CLI audio guard validations
refactor_items.description: Add CPU-only pytest tests covering: (a) --audio with non-ltx23 model exits 1 with correct message; (b) --audio with non-existent file exits 1 with correct message; (c) --audio without --input exits 1 with correct message. These do not require a GPU and can run in CI.
